2603.18004.title: Unified Spatio-Temporal Token Scoring for Efficient Video VLMs
2603.18004.paper_summary: Token pruning is essential for enhancing the computational efficiency of vision-language models (VLMs), particularly for video-based tasks where temporal redundancy is prevalent. Prior approaches typically prune tokens either (1) within the vision transformer (ViT) exclusively for unimodal perception tasks such as action recognition and object segmentation, without adapting to downstream vision-language tasks; or (2) only within the LLM while leaving the ViT output intact, often requiring complex text-conditioned token selection mechanisms. In this paper, we introduce Spatio-Temporal Token Scoring (STTS), a simple and lightweight module that prunes vision tokens across both the ViT and the LLM without text conditioning or token merging, and is fully compatible with end-to-end training. By learning how to score temporally via an auxiliary loss and spatially via LLM downstream gradients, aided by our efficient packing algorithm, STTS prunes 50% of vision tokens throughout the entire architecture, resulting in a 62% improvement in efficiency during both training and inference with only a 0.7% drop in average performance across 13 short and long video QA tasks. Efficiency gains increase with more sampled frames per video. Applying test-time scaling for long-video QA further yields performance gains of 0.5-1% compared to the baseline. Overall, STTS represents a novel, simple yet effective technique for unified, architecture-wide vision token pruning.
2603.18004.paper_summary_zh: Token pruning 對於提升視覺-語言模型 (VLMs) 的計算效率至關重要，特別是在時間冗餘普遍存在的基於視頻的任務中。先前的方法通常僅在視覺Transformer (ViT) 中修剪標記，專門針對單模態感知任務，如動作識別和物體分割，而未針對下游的視覺-語言任務進行調整；或者僅在 LLM 中修剪標記，同時保持 ViT 輸出不變，這通常需要複雜的文本條件標記選擇機制。在本文中，我們介紹了時空標記評分 (STTS)，這是一個簡單且輕量的模塊，能夠在 ViT 和 LLM 之間修剪視覺標記，而無需文本條件或標記合併，並且與端到端訓練完全兼容。通過學習如何通過輔助損失進行時間評分，以及通過 LLM 下游梯度進行空間評分，並借助我們高效的打包算法，STTS 在整個架構中修剪了 50% 的視覺標記，導致在訓練和推理過程中效率提高了 62%，而平均性能僅下降了 0.7%，涵蓋了 13 個短視頻和長視頻的 QA 任務。隨著每個視頻取樣幀數的增加，效率增益也會增加。對於長視頻 QA 應用測試時間縮放，與基線相比進一步帶來了 0.5-1% 的性能增益。總體而言，STTS 代表了一種新穎、簡單而有效的技術，用於統一的、架構範圍內的視覺標記修剪。
2603.18004.author: Jianrui Zhang et.al.
2603.18004.authors: Jianrui Zhang, Yue Yang, Rohun Tripathi, Winson Han, Ranjay Krishna, Christopher Clark, Yong Jae Lee, Sangho Lee
